Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\LEGION\\Downloads\\DACN\\be-ecomerce-shop" && psql -U postgres -d da-ecommerce-shop -c "
-- Check all foreign key constraints
SELECT
    tc.table_name,
    tc.constraint_name,
    kcu.column_name,
    ccu.table_name AS foreign_table_name,
    ccu.column_name AS foreign_column_name
FROM information_schema.table_constraints AS tc
JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage AS kcu ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name
JOIN information_schema.constraint_column_usage AS ccu ON ccu.constraint_name = tc.constraint_name
WHERE tc.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY'
ORDER BY tc.table_name;
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\LEGION\\Downloads\\DACN\\be-ecomerce-shop" && psql -U postgres -d da-ecommerce-shop -c "
-- Check for FK violations: rows referencing non-existent parent rows
SELECT 'Address.userId → User' AS fk, count\(*\) FROM \\"Address\\" a LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON a.\\"userId\\" = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Cart.userId → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"Cart\\" c LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON c.\\"userId\\" = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'CartItems.cartId → Cart', count\(*\) FROM \\"CartItems\\" ci LEFT JOIN \\"Cart\\" c ON ci.\\"cartId\\" = c.id WHERE c.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'CartItems.productVariantId → PV', count\(*\) FROM \\"CartItems\\" ci LEFT JOIN \\"ProductVariants\\" pv ON ci.\\"productVariantId\\" = pv.id WHERE pv.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Category.parentId → Category', count\(*\) FROM \\"Category\\" c LEFT JOIN \\"Category\\" p ON c.\\"parentId\\" = p.id WHERE c.\\"parentId\\" IS NOT NULL AND p.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Category.createByUserId → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"Category\\" c LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON c.\\"createByUserId\\" = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Category.voucherId → Vouchers', count\(*\) FROM \\"Category\\" c LEFT JOIN \\"Vouchers\\" v ON c.\\"voucherId\\" = v.id WHERE c.\\"voucherId\\" IS NOT NULL AND v.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Media.userId → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"Media\\" m LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON m.\\"userId\\" = u.id WHERE m.\\"userId\\" IS NOT NULL AND u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Media.productVariantId → PV', count\(*\) FROM \\"Media\\" m LEFT JOIN \\"ProductVariants\\" pv ON m.\\"productVariantId\\" = pv.id WHERE m.\\"productVariantId\\" IS NOT NULL AND pv.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Media.reviewId → Reviews', count\(*\) FROM \\"Media\\" m LEFT JOIN \\"Reviews\\" r ON m.\\"reviewId\\" = r.id WHERE m.\\"reviewId\\" IS NOT NULL AND r.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Media.requestId → Requests', count\(*\) FROM \\"Media\\" m LEFT JOIN \\"Requests\\" r ON m.\\"requestId\\" = r.id WHERE m.\\"requestId\\" IS NOT NULL AND r.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Media.productId → Products', count\(*\) FROM \\"Media\\" m LEFT JOIN \\"Products\\" p ON m.\\"productId\\" = p.id WHERE m.\\"productId\\" IS NOT NULL AND p.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'OrderItems.orderId → Orders', count\(*\) FROM \\"OrderItems\\" oi LEFT JOIN \\"Orders\\" o ON oi.\\"orderId\\" = o.id WHERE o.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'OrderItems.productVariantId → PV', count\(*\) FROM \\"OrderItems\\" oi LEFT JOIN \\"ProductVariants\\" pv ON oi.\\"productVariantId\\" = pv.id WHERE pv.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Orders.userId → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"Orders\\" o LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON o.\\"userId\\" = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Orders.shippingAddressId → Addr', count\(*\) FROM \\"Orders\\" o LEFT JOIN \\"Address\\" a ON o.\\"shippingAddressId\\" = a.id WHERE a.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Orders.processByStaffId → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"Orders\\" o LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON o.\\"processByStaffId\\" = u.id WHERE o.\\"processByStaffId\\" IS NOT NULL AND u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Payments.orderId → Orders', count\(*\) FROM \\"Payments\\" p LEFT JOIN \\"Orders\\" o ON p.\\"orderId\\" = o.id WHERE o.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'PV.productId → Products', count\(*\) FROM \\"ProductVariants\\" pv LEFT JOIN \\"Products\\" p ON pv.\\"productId\\" = p.id WHERE p.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'PV.createByUserId → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"ProductVariants\\" pv LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON pv.\\"createByUserId\\" = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'PV.colorId → Color', count\(*\) FROM \\"ProductVariants\\" pv LEFT JOIN \\"Color\\" c ON pv.\\"colorId\\" = c.id WHERE c.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'PV.voucherId → Vouchers', count\(*\) FROM \\"ProductVariants\\" pv LEFT JOIN \\"Vouchers\\" v ON pv.\\"voucherId\\" = v.id WHERE pv.\\"voucherId\\" IS NOT NULL AND v.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Products.categoryId → Category', count\(*\) FROM \\"Products\\" p LEFT JOIN \\"Category\\" c ON p.\\"categoryId\\" = c.id WHERE c.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Products.createByUserId → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"Products\\" p LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON p.\\"createByUserId\\" = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Products.voucherId → Vouchers', count\(*\) FROM \\"Products\\" p LEFT JOIN \\"Vouchers\\" v ON p.\\"voucherId\\" = v.id WHERE p.\\"voucherId\\" IS NOT NULL AND v.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Reviews.userId → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"Reviews\\" r LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON r.\\"userId\\" = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Reviews.productId → Products', count\(*\) FROM \\"Reviews\\" r LEFT JOIN \\"Products\\" p ON r.\\"productId\\" = p.id WHERE p.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Reviews.productVariantId → PV', count\(*\) FROM \\"Reviews\\" r LEFT JOIN \\"ProductVariants\\" pv ON r.\\"productVariantId\\" = pv.id WHERE pv.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Shipments.orderId → Orders', count\(*\) FROM \\"Shipments\\" s LEFT JOIN \\"Orders\\" o ON s.\\"orderId\\" = o.id WHERE o.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Shipments.processByStaffId → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"Shipments\\" s LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON s.\\"processByStaffId\\" = u.id WHERE s.\\"processByStaffId\\" IS NOT NULL AND u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'ShipmentItems.shipmentId → Ship', count\(*\) FROM \\"ShipmentItems\\" si LEFT JOIN \\"Shipments\\" s ON si.\\"shipmentId\\" = s.id WHERE s.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'ShipmentItems.orderItemId → OI', count\(*\) FROM \\"ShipmentItems\\" si LEFT JOIN \\"OrderItems\\" oi ON si.\\"orderItemId\\" = oi.id WHERE oi.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Requests.userId → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"Requests\\" r LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON r.\\"userId\\" = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Requests.orderId → Orders', count\(*\) FROM \\"Requests\\" r LEFT JOIN \\"Orders\\" o ON r.\\"orderId\\" = o.id WHERE o.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'ReturnRequests.requestId → Req', count\(*\) FROM \\"ReturnRequests\\" rr LEFT JOIN \\"Requests\\" r ON rr.\\"requestId\\" = r.id WHERE r.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'UserVouchers.userId → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"UserVouchers\\" uv LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON uv.\\"userId\\" = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'UserVouchers.voucherId → Voucher', count\(*\) FROM \\"UserVouchers\\" uv LEFT JOIN \\"Vouchers\\" v ON uv.\\"voucherId\\" = v.id WHERE v.id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Vouchers.createdBy → User', count\(*\) FROM \\"Vouchers\\" v LEFT JOIN \\"User\\" u ON v.\\"createdBy\\" = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL
;" 2>&1)
